funds.name: Emergency Rent Relief Fund
funds.description: Provides short-term emergency rental assistance to households facing eviction, displacement, or loss of housing due to temporary financial hardship.

funds.name: General Support
funds.description: Flexible funding to support the organization’s core housing stability programs, operations, and advocacy.

funds.name: Housing Counseling Fund
funds.description: Supports free one-on-one housing counseling, application assistance, and tenant rights education.

resources.title: Understanding Eviction in Riverton: A Tenant Guide
resources.description: A plain-language guide for Riverton renters explaining the eviction process, key deadlines, and where to get free legal and housing help.

resources.title: Step-by-Step Eviction Response Guide
resources.description: Detailed eviction response guide that walks you through what to do after receiving an eviction notice, including how to respond in writing and prepare for court.

resources.title: Your Rights During an Eviction Case
resources.description: A renter-friendly guide to your rights in eviction court, including when landlords can evict, required notices, and options to stop or delay an eviction.

resources.title: Eviction Timeline Fact Sheet
resources.description: One-page fact sheet summarizing the typical eviction timeline from first notice through court judgment and lockout.

resources.title: Sample Answer to Eviction Complaint (Template)
resources.description: Fill-in-the-blank template you can use to draft an answer if your landlord files an eviction case against you.

resources.title: Preguntas frecuentes sobre desalojos
resources.description: Respuestas a las preguntas más comunes sobre desalojos para inquilinos de bajos ingresos.

resources.title: Tenant Rights 101: Basics for Renters
resources.description: An introductory guide covering leases, rent increases, repairs, and when landlords can and cannot evict you.

resources.title: Affordable Housing Application Checklist
resources.description: Checklist of documents and steps needed to apply for affordable housing lotteries and waitlists.

resources.title: Housing Counseling Session Toolkit
resources.description: Toolkit to help you prepare for a housing counseling appointment, including questions to ask and documents to bring.

resources.title: Rapid Rehousing Program Overview
resources.description: Fact sheet describing who qualifies for Rapid Rehousing, what assistance is available, and how to apply.

resources.title: Transitional Housing: Frequently Asked Questions
resources.description: Answers to common questions about our Transitional Housing program, including length of stay and eligibility.

resources.title: Know Your Rights as a Renter (Video)
resources.description: Short video explaining key tenant protections, how to spot illegal evictions, and when to seek help.

resources.title: How the Emergency Rent Relief Fund Prevents Evictions
resources.description: Article sharing stories of households who avoided eviction through rent relief support.

resources.title: 租客防止被驱逐指南
resources.description: 中文指南，介绍在收到驱逐通知后应该采取的步骤以及如何获得法律援助。

resources.title: Rent Payment Plan Agreement Template
resources.description: Template for negotiating a written rent payment plan with your landlord to avoid eviction.

resources.title: Hoja informativa: Servicios de consejería de vivienda
resources.description: Descripción breve de los servicios de consejería de vivienda disponibles y cómo programar una cita.

resources.title: Local Legal Aid and Tenant Advocacy Directory
resources.description: Directory of free and low-cost legal aid offices, tenant unions, and advocacy groups that can assist with eviction and housing issues.

volunteer_roles.title: Front Desk Welcome Volunteer (Evenings)
volunteer_roles.description: Greet visitors, answer basic questions, and help clients sign in for evening housing counseling appointments at our Downtown Resource Center.

volunteer_roles.title: Tenant Rights Workshop Support
volunteer_roles.description: Assist staff during tenant rights workshops by checking in participants, distributing materials, and helping with Q&A.

volunteer_roles.title: Virtual Housing Helpline Volunteer
volunteer_roles.description: Answer non-legal housing questions over phone or chat from home using our online helpline platform.

volunteer_roles.title: On-Site Food Pantry Support
volunteer_roles.description: Help organize and distribute groceries to residents in our community housing buildings.

volunteer_roles.title: Childcare Helper During Workshops
volunteer_roles.description: Provide supervised play and activities for children while parents attend housing workshops.

volunteer_roles.title: Client Intake Data Entry Volunteer
volunteer_roles.description: Support staff by entering client intake forms into our secure database; basic computer skills required.

volunteer_roles.title: Street Outreach & Flyering
volunteer_roles.description: Distribute flyers about upcoming tenant rights events and rent relief clinics in high-need neighborhoods.

volunteer_roles.title: Spanish-Language Translation Volunteer
volunteer_roles.description: Translate short housing resources and workshop materials from English to Spanish.

volunteer_roles.title: Community Garden Coordinator
volunteer_roles.description: Lead weekly community garden nights at one of our housing sites, coordinating volunteers and residents.

volunteer_roles.title: Move-In Support Volunteer
volunteer_roles.description: Help new residents move in by carrying boxes, assembling furniture, and welcoming them to the community.

neighborhoods.name: Oakwood
neighborhoods.description: A mixed-income Riverton neighborhood with several small apartment buildings and easy access to transit, where many of the organization’s affordable units are located.

neighborhoods.name: Riverside Heights
neighborhoods.description: Hilly residential area along the river with older rental stock and a high concentration of long-term tenants.

neighborhoods.name: Downtown Core
neighborhoods.description: Central business district of Riverton with a mix of offices, services, and limited housing above storefronts.

neighborhoods.name: Lakeside Shores
neighborhoods.description: Lakeside neighborhood of mid-rise buildings and family-oriented developments near the waterfront.

neighborhoods.name: Brookfield Gardens
neighborhoods.description: Garden-style apartment complexes surrounding shared green spaces and playgrounds.

neighborhoods.name: Harborview Point
neighborhoods.description: Dense urban neighborhood near the harbor with a mix of subsidized and market-rate housing.

programs.name: Transitional Housing
programs.description: Time-limited housing and intensive case management for households transitioning out of homelessness into permanent housing.
programs.servicesOffered: Private or shared rooms, on-site case management, life-skills workshops, and housing search support.

programs.name: Rapid Rehousing
programs.description: Short- to medium-term rental assistance and housing search help for people who are homeless or at immediate risk of losing housing.
programs.servicesOffered: Rental assistance, landlord mediation, move-in cost support, and housing stabilization case management.

programs.name: Riverton Emergency Shelter
programs.description: Low-barrier emergency shelter beds with nightly check-in for individuals experiencing homelessness in Riverton.
programs.servicesOffered: Overnight beds, basic meals, showers, and referrals to housing programs.

programs.name: Lakeside Permanent Supportive Housing
programs.description: Long-term affordable housing with on-site services for people with disabilities who have experienced chronic homelessness.
programs.servicesOffered: Permanent apartments, clinical case management, health navigation, and peer support.

programs.name: Harborview Family Shelter
programs.description: Short-term shelter for families with children who have lost their housing or are fleeing unsafe situations.
programs.servicesOffered: Family rooms, meals, children’s programming, and housing navigation support.

programs.name: Brookfield Senior Housing
programs.description: Affordable apartments with light-support services for low-income seniors aged 62 and older.
programs.servicesOffered: Accessible units, wellness checks, benefits assistance, and on-site social activities.

programs.name: Emergency Rent Relief Program
programs.description: One-time financial assistance to prevent eviction for renters who have fallen behind on rent due to a temporary hardship.
programs.servicesOffered: Back rent payments to landlords, limited utility assistance, and budgeting support.

programs.name: Riverton Homelessness Prevention
programs.description: Light-touch assistance for renters at risk of eviction, focused on mediation and short-term stabilization.
programs.servicesOffered: Landlord mediation, limited rental arrears assistance, and connection to legal aid.

programs.name: Lakeside Youth Transitional Housing
programs.description: Shared transitional housing for young adults ages 18–24 exiting foster care or experiencing homelessness.
programs.servicesOffered: Shared apartments, education and employment support, and independent living skills coaching.

programs.name: Riverton Project-Based Voucher Apartments
programs.description: Subsidized apartments with rent based on income for extremely low-income households.
programs.servicesOffered: Long-term affordable units with on-site resident services and community activities.

programs.name: Harborview Rapid Rehousing for Families
programs.description: Rapid rehousing assistance targeted to families with children staying in Harborview shelters or doubled up.
programs.servicesOffered: Short-term rent support, moving assistance, and housing stability case management.

programs.name: Brookfield Family Bridge Housing
programs.description: Bridge housing for families leaving shelter while they search for permanent housing options.
programs.servicesOffered: Furnished family units, case management, school liaison support, and housing navigation.

programs.name: Safe Housing for Survivors of Violence
programs.description: Confidential shelter and rehousing support for survivors of domestic violence and their children.
programs.servicesOffered: Safe confidential units, safety planning, legal advocacy, and rapid rehousing referrals.

programs.name: Lakeside Shared Housing Network
programs.description: Roommate matching and shared housing placements for low-income single adults.
programs.servicesOffered: Shared housing placement, conflict mediation, and light rental assistance.

programs.name: Riverton Housing Counseling Program
programs.description: Free one-on-one counseling to help renters understand their rights, complete applications, and prevent eviction.
programs.servicesOffered: Tenant rights education, application assistance, budgeting, and referrals to legal and financial resources.

events.title: Tenant Rights 101 (Online Evening Workshop)
events.description: Interactive online workshop covering basic tenant protections, legal notices, and what to do if you receive an eviction notice.

events.title: Renter Rights Deep Dive (Online)
events.description: A deeper look at renter protections, repairs, retaliation, and local ordinances, with time for Q&A.

events.title: Know Your Rights: Weekend Tenant Workshop (Online)
events.description: Weekend tenant rights overview designed for renters who cannot attend weekday sessions.

events.title: Emergency Rent Relief Info Session
events.description: Brief online presentation about the Emergency Rent Relief Program, eligibility, and how to apply.

events.title: In-Person Tenant Rights Clinic
events.description: Small-group clinic at our Downtown Office focused on reviewing leases and recent eviction notices.

events.title: Finding Affordable Housing Workshop
events.description: Tips for searching for affordable rentals, applying to lotteries, and avoiding scams.

events.title: Budgeting for Stable Housing (Hybrid Class)
events.description: Learn budgeting strategies and how to prioritize rent and utilities; attend in-person or join online.

events.title: Volunteer Orientation for New Helpers
events.description: Required orientation for new volunteers covering our mission, policies, and available roles.

events.title: Spring Community Breakfast & Fundraiser
events.description: Morning gathering with updates on our housing work and opportunities to give.

events.title: Tenant Rights Evening Workshop (Online)
events.description: Online tenant rights workshop scheduled for early April for renters needing evening options.

events.title: Lunchtime Renter Rights Q&A
events.description: Short midday webinar answering common renter rights questions submitted by the community.

housing_listings.title: Cozy 1-Bedroom in Oakwood Near Transit
housing_listings.description: Sunny 1-bedroom apartment in a small walk-up building just two blocks from the Oakwood bus line. On-site laundry and community garden.

housing_listings.title: Oakwood 1BR with Balcony
housing_listings.description: Light-filled 1-bedroom unit with a small balcony overlooking a shared courtyard. Elevator building, community room, and bike storage.

housing_listings.title: Affordable 1BR in Oakwood Courtyard Building
housing_listings.description: Ground-floor 1-bedroom apartment with step-free entry, on-site laundry, and close access to the Oakwood playground.

housing_listings.title: Oakwood 1BR Near Community Center
housing_listings.description: Top-floor 1-bedroom with views of the Oakwood Community Center. Stairs only; no elevator.

housing_listings.title: Spacious 2BR Oakwood Family Unit
housing_listings.description: Family-friendly 2-bedroom apartment with on-site playground and resident services.

housing_listings.title: Riverside Heights 1BR with River View
housing_listings.description: Upper-floor 1-bedroom overlooking the river. Elevator building close to grocery and bus lines.

housing_listings.title: Compact Studio in Riverside Heights
housing_listings.description: Small but efficient studio unit ideal for a single adult, with shared laundry and bike storage.

housing_listings.title: Single Room Occupancy in Downtown Core
housing_listings.description: Furnished single room with private bath and shared kitchen in historic downtown building.

housing_listings.title: Lakeside Shores 2BR Near Waterfront
housing_listings.description: Bright 2-bedroom apartment near the lakefront paths, with on-site parking and laundry.

housing_listings.title: Lakeside 1BR Close to Transit
housing_listings.description: Updated 1-bedroom unit with new flooring, a small balcony, and easy access to bus routes.

housing_listings.title: Brookfield Gardens 3BR Townhome
housing_listings.description: Two-story townhome with private patio, close to playgrounds and schools.

housing_listings.title: Shared 3BR Unit at Harborview Point
housing_listings.description: Private bedroom in a shared 3-bedroom apartment with two other tenants, shared kitchen and living room.

housing_listings.title: Downtown Micro-Studio Near Transit Hub
housing_listings.description: Compact micro-studio with built-in storage and shared rooftop terrace in the downtown core.

appointments.name: Maria Sanchez
appointments.notes: Worried about a recent rent increase and possible eviction notice.

appointments.name: James Lee
appointments.notes: Needs help understanding lease terms and late fees.

appointments.name: Danielle Brooks
appointments.notes: Seeking assistance applying for affordable housing listings in Lakeside.

appointments.name: Omar Rahman
appointments.notes: Has questions about rights after receiving a 3-day pay-or-quit notice.
